summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ERP UI refactoring - TopNav with direct links. All features working correctly per user requirements.

issues: Chart width/height warnings in console (recharts) - doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: None - using real MongoDB Atlas data
context_for_next_testing_agent: TopNav refactoring verified. All direct links work: Dashboard, Fatture(/fatture-ricevute), Prima Nota, Banca(/riconciliazione), Fisco, Fornitori, HR(/dipendenti). Only 'Altro' has dropdown menu. Year selector shows 'ANNO' label. SecondaryTabs work correctly on all pages.

topnav_direct_links.details: Dashboard, Fatture (180 badge), Prima Nota, Banca (dot indicator), Fisco, Fornitori, HR - all direct NavLinks, no dropdowns

altro_dropdown_only.details: Only 'Altro' has dropdown with chevron indicator. Contains: Bilancio, Mutui, Contabilità, Magazzino, Cucina, Scadenze, etc.

anno_label_selector.details: Year selector shows 'ANNO' label with year dropdown (2022-2027), 2026 selected by default

hr_navigation.details: Click HR → /dipendenti directly. SecondaryTabs: Anagrafica, Cedolini, Presenze, TFR (all present)

fatture_navigation.details: Click Fatture → /fatture-ricevute. SecondaryTabs: Fatture Ricevute, Corrispettivi, Archivio (all present)

fisco_navigation.details: Click Fisco → /fisco. SecondaryTabs: F24, Liquidazione IVA, Calcolo IVA (all present)

banca_navigation.details: Click Banca → /riconciliazione. SecondaryTabs: Riconciliazione, Bonifici, Assegni (all present)

fornitori_page.details: Displays 316 fornitori with supplier cards, search/filter functionality

no_duplicate_titles.details: Gestione Assegni page has no duplicate titles - shows 'Assegni Senza Beneficiario' and 'Lista Assegni (209)'

dashboard_real_data.details: Dashboard shows: 1 F24 (€7.465,00), 3 scadenze, Bilancio €31.395,51, Imposte €7.846,33, Backend connesso

api_suppliers.details: /api/suppliers returns 316 suppliers with complete data structure
